understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the goal gem tile, marked '+', by navigating the grid and avoiding spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT). After moving, gravity pulls the character until landing on a solid surface or hitting a hazard (spikes) which ends the run. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') to open paths, while UNDO reverts the last action. The game provides landing previews to show where the character will end up after a move.
